summary: Inventory-service is timing out to its database, and the root cause is still unclear after the deploy rollback.

cookbook.title: Collect evidence before deeper database investigation

items.action: Capture fresh database timeout logs and connection metrics.
items.done_when: The team has one clean evidence bundle with timestamps and affected hosts.

items.action: Compare the failing hosts against healthy hosts for connection and latency differences.
items.done_when: An engineer can explain what is different about the unhealthy path.
